view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly demonstrates that a unique Zoom meeting link is automatically generated upon booking confirmation. This link is included in the confirmation email and added to both the therapist's and client's Google Calendar, fulfilling the requirement for automatic link generation. The successful execution of the booking process, as evidenced by the confirmed booking details, supports this conclusion.
